description: Add a Summary section to the body of a note without disturbing its YAML frontmatter
userMessage: The note 'eval-scratch/quarterly-review.md' has a YAML frontmatter block at the top. Add a new '## Summary' section to the END of the note body with a one or two sentence recap. Do not change the frontmatter and do not remove any existing body text.

value: The biggest pain point was the billing escalation path
